input: Apply our brand voice to this proposal draft for a Fortune 500 client
expected_behavior: Skill activates, reads brand config, applies confident+structured tone calibration for proposals, uses preferred vocabulary, ensures active voice dominance (<15% passive), and closes with appropriate brand closing line

input: Write a LinkedIn post about our latest project in our brand tone
expected_behavior: Skill activates with warm+energetic social tone, uses human hook opening, conversational style without buzzwords, concrete takeaway, and brand tagline when appropriate

input: Review this copy for brand consistency but we haven't set up our brand config yet
expected_behavior: Skill activates with neutral professional defaults (clear, direct, active voice, no jargon), applies review, and prompts user to provide brand config for branded output

input: Help us write a crisis communication about a data breach in our brand voice
expected_behavior: Skill activates with crisis tone (calm+accountable), overrides any other tone context, ensures transparent and solution-focused language, avoids deflection or blame

input: Design the visual layout and color palette for our website
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate. This is a visual design/HTML request, not a voice/tone request. Should route to brand-html or design-system skill instead.
